nav.switchRoleHint: Switch to an authorized role to view staff tools
nav.noTelemetryBody: The portal stores no reporter IP address, user-agent, fingerprint, or geolocation.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.subtitle: Reporter sessions cannot view staff workspaces.
accessDenied.body: This boundary is intentional. In production, staff access requires OIDC login, MFA, short sessions, role authorization, and audit logging. Reporter sessions stay isolated from case-management data.
accessDenied.staffBanner: Staff tools require an authorized role with MFA in production. Reporter sessions remain isolated from back-office data.

report.subtitle: Privacy-preserving intake, step {{step}} of 2
report.hrSeparatedBody: Individual employment grievances are routed to HR. No tracking code is issued, and no reporter telemetry is collected here.
report.areaHelper: Use the broadest useful area to reduce re-identification risk.
report.factsPlaceholder: Describe what happened, when, and what evidence exists. Avoid details that identify you unless they are necessary.
report.factsHelper: Do not include personal data that is not needed to assess the report.
report.anonymousDefaultBody: SafeVoice does not collect reporter IP address, device fingerprint, browser fingerprint, user-agent, or geolocation for report handling.
report.relayBody: The portal stores only a vault reference. Investigators never see the contact value.
report.relayHelper: The actual value is discarded and represented as a vault reference.
report.privacyNoticeController: Controller: {{controller}}. Purpose: receive, assess, follow up, and document reports. Personal data not relevant to the report must not be collected or must be deleted promptly.
report.privacyNoticeExternal: You may also report externally to {{authority}} or another competent authority where applicable. Case feedback is due within {{months}} months after acknowledgement (extendable to {{extension}} months in justified cases).
report.privacyNoticeExternalNoExtension: You may also report externally to {{authority}} or another competent authority where applicable. Case feedback is due within {{months}} months after acknowledgement.
report.safeguard2: No reporter IP, user-agent, fingerprint, or geolocation collection
report.safeguard3: Evidence metadata stripping and malware scanning before vault storage
report.safeguard4: Irrelevant personal data deletion review within {{days}} days
report.safeguard5: External reporting information available before submission

success.subReport: Your report is stored as a minimized case record. Keep the tracking code offline.
success.subHr: This item was separated from anonymous whistleblower tracking and routed to HR handling.
success.hrNoCodeTitle: No anonymous tracking code was issued.
success.hrNoCodeBody: The portal avoids collecting reporter telemetry here as well, but an HR grievance process may require different notices, confidentiality terms, and contact procedures.
success.cannotIdentify: SafeVoice cannot identify you from the tracking code. Losing it may prevent anonymous follow-up.

track.title: Track anonymous report
track.subtitle: Use only the code issued after submission
track.codeHelper: No account, email address, IP address, or device identifier is required.
track.notFound: Tracking code not found. HR handoff items do not receive tracking codes.
track.addEvidenceSub: Original filenames are replaced with generic evidence references

dashboard.title: Case operations
dashboard.subtitle: Operational queue focused on acknowledgement, follow-up, retention, and authorized access.
dashboard.workflowSubtitle: Production controls represented in the portal
dashboard.workflow3: Keep reporter metadata unavailable to administrators
dashboard.workflow4: Review irrelevant personal data for deletion within {{days}} days
dashboard.workflow5: Apply legal hold only with documented reason
dashboard.analyticsBody: Trend charts and department heatmaps were removed because low-volume reporting analytics can reveal who reported or when a team reported.
dashboard.nextActionBody: Open the case register to triage, assign, message, close, or apply retention holds.

cases.searchPlaceholder: Search by case, category, status, or broad area
cases.footer: Active role: {{role}}. Table intentionally omits narrative text and reporter contact data.

caseDetails.replyPlaceholder: Reply without asking for identity unless necessary
caseDetails.notePlaceholder: Internal note. Avoid unnecessary personal data.

inbox.noChannels: No anonymous communication channels are active.

audits.title: Immutable audit trail
audits.subtitle: Admin-visible log excludes reporter IP, user-agent, fingerprints, geolocation, and message bodies.
audits.wormNote: Hash-chain demo only; production requires WORM storage.

users.title: Access controls
users.subtitle: Least-privilege roles with MFA and authorization status.
users.permissionMatrixSub: Exports and user administration are intentionally narrow

settings.defaultRetentionBody: {{years}} years after the calendar year in which follow-up ends or related proceedings end.
settings.irrelevantDataBody: Delete within {{days}} days after determining it is not relevant to the report.
settings.legalHoldBody: Suspends deletion only with reason, approver, timestamp, and periodic review.
settings.secureDestructionBody: Delete DB rows, KMS data keys, object versions, quarantine copies, and search indexes.
settings.processingBasisBody: Reports are processed to receive, verify, follow up, communicate with the reporter, document actions, and protect against retaliation. Production deployments need a tenant-specific privacy notice and DPA.
settings.responsibilitiesBody: The customer organization is controller for its report register. SafeVoice acts as processor unless it determines purposes and means for shared operations. Processor contracts must cover sub-processors, EU hosting, audit rights, deletion, and incident response.

evidence.dropPrompt: Drag and drop evidence, or browse
evidence.fileTypes: PDF, PNG, JPG, XML, DOCX only. Original filenames are not shown to administrators.
evidence.unsupported: Unsupported file type. Use PDF, PNG, JPG, XML, or DOCX only.
evidence.tooLarge: File exceeds the 10 MB evidence limit.
evidence.scanning: Scanning, stripping metadata, and sealing vault reference
